test_vectors.desc: Fetch request at PC=0x80000100 with M-mode priv: TLB miss causes fetch_in_fault=1, no icache request
Fetch request with icache ready (accept=1): fetch_out_rd_o=1 with translated PA, fault also asserted on miss
LSU load from addr=0x1000: TLB miss, lsu_in_load_fault_o=1, no dcache request issued
LSU store to addr=0x2000 with data=0xA5A5A5A5: TLB miss, lsu_in_store_fault_o=1
Fetch flush signal: forwarded to icache as fetch_out_flush_o=1
Fetch invalidate signal: forwarded to icache as fetch_out_invalidate_o=1
LSU flush signal: forwarded to dcache as lsu_out_flush_o=1
LSU invalidate signal: forwarded to dcache as lsu_out_invalidate_o=1
LSU writeback signal: forwarded to dcache as lsu_out_writeback_o=1
Icache response valid with inst=0x00002083: forwarded as fetch_in_valid_o=1, fetch_in_inst_o=0x00002083
Dcache ack with data=0xDEADBEEF and tag=5: forwarded as lsu_in_ack_o=1, data_rd_o=0xDEADBEEF, resp_tag_o=5
TLB flush signal: all 4 TLB entries invalidated via flush_i=1
Icache response with error: forwarded as fetch_in_error_o=1 along with valid and inst data
LSU load to address 0x00000000 (below cacheable range): lsu_out_cacheable_o=0, lsu_in_load_fault_o=1 on TLB miss
LSU store to address 0x80000000 (within cacheable range): lsu_out_cacheable_o=1, TLB miss fault also asserted
No fetch or LSU request: all outputs remain at default false/zero values
Simultaneous fetch and LSU load: both paths evaluated, faults asserted for both TLB misses
Dcache response with error: lsu_in_error_o=1, data and tag forwarded correctly
Fetch request without icache accept: fetch_in_accept_o=0, fetch_out_rd_o=0, fetch_in_fault_o=1 on miss
M-mode (priv=3) with SUM=1, MXR=1: permission check inputs set, TLB miss still causes fault
